15.reason: [gets() is unsafe and deprecated; it can cause buffer overflow and is not standard in modern C. Use fgets() instead.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [gets() is unsafe and deprecated; it can cause buffer overflow and is not standard in modern C. Use fgets() instead.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [gets() is unsafe and removed from C11 standard; use fgets() instead]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  The 'gets' function is deprecated and removed from the C11 standard. Most modern compilers will reject it or treat its use as an error, causing a compilation failure. Use scanf("%s", s) or fgets instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Compilation error: gets() is removed in the C11 standard and causes compilation failure in modern compilers. Use scanf("%s", s) or fgets().]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Compilation error in modern C (C11 and later): 'gets' has been removed from the standard library due to security vulnerabilities; use 'scanf("%s", s)' or 'fgets(s, sizeof(s), stdin)' instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Use of unsafe function 'gets' which may cause buffer overflow; also, some compilers/environments may not support it, leading to compilation or runtime issues]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Using gets() is unsafe and deprecated; may cause buffer overflow. Also, some compilers/environments disable gets(), leading to compilation error. Should use fgets() instead.]

5.reason: [condition fails to ensure b>='a' and a<='z'; may accept invalid characters]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  [condition fails to ensure b>='a' and a<='z'; may accept invalid characters]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Logical error: Condition incorrectly checks ranges. It should verify both a and b are within [a-z], e.g., a>='a' && a<='z' && b>='a' && b<='z' && b>a.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Logical error: missing upper bound check for 'a' (a<='z') and lower bound check for 'b' (b>='a'). This fails to ensure both characters are strictly within the same valid range.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect condition: should also ensure 'a' is <= 'z'; current logic allows e.g. 'A' and 'm' to pass if b <= 'z' and b > a]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect condition: should also check that 'a' <= 'z' and 'b' >= 'a'; current logic allows cases like a='0', b='b' to pass if b>a, because it doesn't ensure both are in the same category]

7.reason: [condition fails to ensure b>='A' and a<='Z']

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  [condition fails to ensure b>='A' and a<='Z']
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Logical error: Condition incorrectly checks ranges. It should verify both a and b are within [A-Z], e.g., a>='A' && a<='Z' && b>='A' && b<='Z' && b>a.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Logical error: missing upper bound check for 'a' (a<='Z') and lower bound check for 'b' (b>='A').
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect condition: should also ensure 'a' is <= 'Z'; current logic allows e.g. '0' and 'K' to pass if b <= 'Z' and b > a]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Same issue: missing lower bound check for 'b' and upper bound check for 'a'; e.g., a='z', b='B' might incorrectly pass if b>a due to ASCII values]

9.reason: [condition fails to ensure b>='0' and a<='9']

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  [condition fails to ensure b>='0' and a<='9']
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Logical error: Condition incorrectly checks ranges. It should verify both a and b are within [0-9], e.g., a>='0' && a<='9' && b>='0' && b<='9' && b>a.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Logical error: missing upper bound check for 'a' (a<='9') and lower bound check for 'b' (b>='0').
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect condition: should also ensure 'a' is <= '9'; current logic allows e.g. 'a' and '5' to pass if b <= '9' and b > a]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Same issue: does not verify that 'b' >= '0' and 'a' <= '9'; could allow mixed-type ranges]

22.reason: [Logical error: When check returns false, the '-' character is not printed. An else branch is needed to output '-' when expansion conditions are not met.]
